checks.message: 0 truly isolated notes. 32 nodes have no incoming edges (HUB/TOPIC MoCs — expected for entry points).
Avg 7.66 outgoing edges/node (up from 5.54). Minimum degree 3 across all 385 nodes.
37 MoCs (27 pre-existing + 10 created via /synthesize). Top topic clusters now have dedicated MoCs.
Note types still case-inconsistent (PATTERN vs pattern) from mixed-source ingestion. Normalize via setNoteType in a follow-up.

recommendations: Densification pass complete: 32 isolated notes → 0; min degree raised from 1 to 3; avg outgoing edges/node 5.54 → 7.66.
10 new MoCs created for previously un-MoC'd topic clusters (reducer patterns, MCP workflows, operational-hub, etc.). 84 CORE_IDEA edges added.
Remaining 32 no-incoming nodes are mostly HUB/TOPIC MoCs at the top of the hierarchy — expected for entry-point documents.
Indexer bug persists: graph_edges.link_type field is null for all rows (DocumentRelationship has the correct type). Investigate the processor's mirror write in a follow-up.
